nasb.text: But I will surely hide My face in that day because of all the evil which they will do, for they will turn to other gods.

esv.text: And I will surely hide my face in that day because of all the evil that they have done, because they have turned to other gods.

cnv.text: 到了那日，因為他們偏向了別的神，和所作的一切惡事，我必掩面不顧他們。

ccb.text: 那时，我必掩面不理他们，因为他们祭拜别的神明，行为邪恶。
